admin_subscription_message1: I am writing to inform you that a new subscription has been purchased for our service. The details of the subscription are as follows:
admin_subscription_message2: The payment for the subscription has been successfully processed, and the subscriber is now able to access the features of their subscription.
subscription_message1: I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to confirm your recent subscription purchase with our company.
subscription_message2: We are thrilled to have you as a subscriber and we appreciate your trust in us. Your subscription will provide you access to our premium services, exclusive content and special offers throughout the duration of your subscription period.
subscription_message3: Here are the details of your purchase:
subscription_message4: Your subscription is now active and you can start enjoying the benefits of our services right away. You can log in to your account using the email address and password you provided during registration.
subscription_message5: If you have any questions or concerns regarding your subscription, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team. We are always available to assist you with any queries you may have.
subscription_message6: Thank you once again for choosing us as your preferred service provider. We look forward to providing you with the best experience possible.
cod_message1: We hope this email finds you well. We are writing to confirm that we have received your recent subscription request and payment via COD. We appreciate your business and thank you for choosing our services.
cod_message2: We are currently processing your subscription request and will be in touch with you shortly. Depending on the nature of the subscription, you may receive further instructions, access to a service, or confirmation of your subscription.
cod_message3: If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. Our customer support team is available to assist you with any inquiries you may have.
cod_message4: Thank you again for choosing our services. We look forward to providing you with the best possible experience.
recevied_new_subscription_request: You have received new subscription request from
check_email_message: Login to your account and check the details. You may Approve OR Reject

payout_message1: I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to confirm your payout request has been submitted with our company.
payout_message2: We are thrilled to have you as a subscriber and we appreciate your trust in us.
payout_message3: Here are the details of your payout:
payout_message4: If you have any questions or concerns regarding your payout, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team. We are always available to assist you with any queries you may have.
payout_message5: Thank you once again for choosing us as your preferred service provider. We look forward to providing you with the best experience possible.
admin_payout_message1: I am writing to inform you that a new payout request has been submitted. The details of the payout are as follows:
total_revenue_including_all_providers_bo: Total revenue amount with tax of all vendors for all completed bookings which has payment status paid
total_commission_admin_get: Total commission amount received from all vendors for all completed bookings which has payment status paid
total_pending_payout_for_admin: Total pending payout amount which will need to pay to vendors
total_completed_payout_for_admin: Total completed payout amount which was paid to vendors
total_revenue_excluding_tax: Total revenue amount with tax for all completed bookings which has payment status paid
total_tax_refund_from_admin: Total tax amount for all completed bookings which has payment status paid
total_commission_you_pay_to_admin: Total commission amount paid to admin for all completed bookings which has payment status paid
total_earning_provider: Total earnings after paying commission amount to admin for all completed bookings which has payment status paid
current_balance_provider: Current wallet balance which you can request for payout from admin
last_payout_provider: Last payout amount which is approved by admin
